author: Kuestenlogik
name: Bowire mock emitter
description: A scaffold for an IBowireMockEmitter implementation that replays BowireRecording steps over a wire protocol. Drop into a Bowire-plugin project that already references Kuestenlogik.Bowire.

EmitterId.description: Stable id returned from IBowireMockEmitter.Id — usually the protocol id ('amqp', 'kafka', …).
